message:
feat(support-bundle): add privacy mode enforcement (bd-2yi1i)

Integrate privacy mode into support-bundle command:

- Add --allow-persist flag to override privacy restrictions
- Add collectSessionDataWithPrivacy function that checks privacy mode
- Skip scrollback capture when privacy mode is enabled (safe by default)
- Add PRIVACY_SUPPRESSED.txt placeholder when content is suppressed
- Include privacy_mode and privacy_sessions in JSON output
- Show clear warning message with override instructions

Behavior:
- If session has privacy mode enabled:
  - Scrollback content is suppressed by default
  - Metadata is still included (session name, pane count, etc.)
  - Use --allow-persist to include private content
- If privacy mode is disabled:
  - Normal behavior (all content included)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
